text.title: VR Design Patterns for Accessibility and Comfort Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Is snap turn the default (smooth opt-in)?

branch.question: Is the locomotion choice (teleport default + 1 alternate) provided?

text.example: Concrete walk: Training VR: snap 30° + vignette on + teleport default + arm-swing alt + retreat on wrist menu → approve.
